title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
summary: OpenAI推出Daybreak工具集，包括Codex Security和GPT-5.5-Cyber，旨在帮助组织大规模发现、验证和修补漏洞，提升安全防护能力。
analysis_note: 结合AI与安全领域，提供实用工具，技术价值高，但非核心模型突破。
